case_title: TOPAL, EVAN DBA ACME CAD COMPANY VS ELLERT, RICHARD GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO TOPAL EVAN, OWNER ACME CAD CO. RETURNED SIGNED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTE:INFORMED DEFT.CONTO DTE FOR 7/19 130PM STILL HAS TO BE APPROVED,DEFT.WANTS TO SRV PLTF NOW&WILL WAIT FOR COMM'S DECISION.&DEAL W/IT LATER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-09-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY TOPAL, EVAN DBA ACME CAD COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ELLERT, RICHARD  GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ELLERT, RICHARD  GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TOPAL, EVAN DBA ACME CAD COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELLERT, RICHARD  GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC
DEFT.FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 7/19/99 130PM, PAID $10 CHECK(CAL:20-0),FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOPAL, EVAN DBA ACME CAD COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLERT, RICHARD  GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,926.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ELLERT, RICHARD  GLOBAL PRODUCTION & SOURCING INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT TOPAL, EVAN DBA ACME CAD COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
